title: Was EVA 05 sabotaged or was it MEANT to self destruct
display_title: Was EVA 05 sabotaged or was it MEANT to self destruct
wikitext:
[]: Was EVA-05 sabotaged or was it MEANT to self-destruct?             Quote Post by Kodaemon » Sat Apr 02, 2011 1:36 am People usually seem to assume that Unit 05's self-destruction was a result of sabotage. However, let's look at some stuff about this Eva: -it's called a "Provisional Unit", which suggests something that's not really built to last. -it also doesn't seem to be built for combat but rather for excavation/maintenance purposes with the drills, tools etc. -it's power supply method is reliant on Bethany Base's infrastructure. -it has an intricate setup for ejecting the entry plug So, I'd say 05 was built specifically for service at Bethany, and set to automatically self-destruct (safely ejecting the pilot first) in the case Tunniel broke out out and got destroyed.

[]:             Quote Post by juaxoo » Sat Apr 02, 2011 1:40 am i object, based on many supporting evidences, long-lasting forum flames/battles, countless sacrifices, obvious points that: unit5 was created by the ultimate troll anno for the beginning/intro of the 2nd installment of rebuild of eva series, and to intoduce the character Mari, while subtly telling where Kaji retrieved his adam key for gendo. it just looks totally badass and cool, and probably what happens when anno plays bioshock THAT IS ALL FOLKS! TUNE IN NEXT TIME FOR ANOTHER JUAXOO EXPLANATION! (THERE'LL BE PLENTY OF FAN SERVICE TOO!)

[]:             Quote Post by makinami » Sat Apr 02, 2011 1:57 am I think the answer to this question is "Yes." Though, I have the feeling that the super rocket punch action on Mari's entry plug was courtesy of Kaji, or at the very least not part of the intended scenario. Unit 05 seemed to be finished in a hurry, considering the cybernetic arms, etc; while the build team probably didn't intend for it to go 'splodey, methinks Seele knew/wanted Bethany Base, Unit 05 and its pilot, and Tunniel to all hold hands and skip right into the afterlife together from the very beginning. Everything above this line is nonsense. Ignore it.

[]:             Quote Post by Fireand'chutes77 » Sat Apr 02, 2011 2:09 am I just saw 2.22 for the first time a few hours ago. Until I came on EvaGeeks to read up on it without fear of spoilers, I had no idea there was the theory that the explosion was due to sabotage. Maybe I wasn't paying enough attention to Kaji... Anyway, I'll have to rewatch, but it seemed as though Eva-05 blew up because all the previous attacks didn't leave it *completely* dead... Or at least to ensure the Angel died - "it's the only way to be sure." And the meticulous detail of the ejection process - which reminded me strongly of the Apollo/Orion Launch Escape System - seems to indicate that the destruction of Eva-05 was, at the least, deemed a possibility that needed to be accommodated.

[]:             Quote Post by Seele00TextOnly » Sat Apr 02, 2011 2:28 am ...

[]:             Quote Post by Warren Peace » Sat Apr 02, 2011 2:45 am Seele mentions the absence of Unit-05 as being an impediment to their plans. So that would rule out the first three of Kodaemon's bullet points in my view. It could be that Unit-05 itself resembled the other humanoid Evas but was only attached to/sitting in the more unorthodox aspects of its design.

[]:             Quote Post by Kodaemon » Sat Apr 02, 2011 3:02 am Seele00TextOnly wrote: I'm pretty sure it blew up from Tunniel's attack combined with her pushing it too hard in those final moments. Never ever have I heard sabotage implied in 05's destruction before this thread.

[]:             Quote Post by Warren Peace » Sat Apr 02, 2011 4:52 am They make pretty much the same point ("It is within correctable limits. There should be no problem."). I don't see what anybody's motive to destroy Unit-05 would be... Seele doesn't need it, but they'd like to have it, it seems. There's a heavy implication (by Gendo and Kaji) that Seele destroyed Unit-04. What the motive is there isn't clear either.

[]:             Quote Post by Kodaemon » Sat Apr 02, 2011 5:04 am Well, while I doubt it would be worth it for that alone, 04's destruction makes it easy for Seele to force 03, along with Bardiel, on Gendo. Note how the transport with 03 is shown lifting off even before the conference.

[]:             Quote Post by Warren Peace » Sat Apr 02, 2011 6:02 am How would Seele benefit from that?

[]:             Quote Post by Kodaemon » Sat Apr 02, 2011 7:39 am I admit I'm taking into account the unused storyboard translated by Reichu -> http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?p=439425#439425

[]:             Quote Post by makinami » Sat Apr 02, 2011 10:30 pm Seele00TextOnly wrote: I'm pretty sure it blew up from Tunniel's attack combined with her pushing it too hard in those final moments. Never ever have I heard sabotage implied in 05's destruction before this thread.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Apr 05, 2011 9:58 pm Kodaemon wrote: I admit I'm taking into account the unused storyboard translated by Reichu

[]:             Quote Post by Tabby-chan » Thu Apr 07, 2011 8:14 pm ...What's wrong with you people? Kaji-san directly stated that Unit-05's destrucion was entirely deliberate. ... ..... .... ............... . . .................. ...Seriously, now.

[]: Was EVA-05 sabotaged or was it MEANT to self-destruct?             Quote Post by Kodaemon » Sat Apr 02, 2011 1:36 am People usually seem to assume that Unit 05's self-destruction was a result of sabotage. However, let's look at some stuff about this Eva: -it's called a "Provisional Unit", which suggests something that's not really built to last. -it also doesn't seem to be built for combat but rather for excavation/maintenance purposes with the drills, tools etc. -it's power supply method is reliant on Bethany Base's infrastructure. -it has an intricate setup for ejecting the entry plug So, I'd say 05 was built specifically for service at Bethany, and set to automatically self-destruct (safely ejecting the pilot first) in the case Tunniel broke out out and got destroyed.
